emails.subject: Assignment of Oasis Pipeline contracts
emails.body: The Oasis Pipeline Contracts are still being routed for signature. However, I received this e-mail from Stacey Neuweiler to continue business as ENA not HPLC. Thanks You. Marlene Hilliard Forwarded by Marlene Hilliard/HOU/ECT on 08/31/2000 10:52 AM Stacey Neuweiler 08/31/2000 10:50 AM

emails.subject: Assignment of Oasis Pipeline contracts
emails.body: On Friday, September 1, 2000, I contacted Sandra Grimes and John Lopez and informed them that a letter to disregard the Assignement and Assumption Agreement would be forwarded to their offices on Tuesday, September 5, 2000. Please let me know when this letter or agreement is complete so I can route it for signature. If it will not be ready today, please let me know. Marlene D. Hilliard Forwarded by Marlene Hilliard/HOU/ECT on 09/05/2000 09:04 AM Marlene Hilliard 09/01/2000 02:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: Assignment of Oasis Pipeline contracts
emails.body: Re: Assignment of Oasis Pipeline contracts Marlene, Attached for your further handling is the letter to rescind the assignment and assumption agreement. If you have any questions give me a call. Thanks, Eric Gillaspie 713-345-7667 Enron Building 3886 Marlene Hilliard 09/01/2000 02:52 PM
